prompt: 给 extractor/extract.py 里面每一个函数都写一个独立可运行的样例文件

assertions.text: Every function in extract.py has a corresponding .py file (strict 1:1 mapping, no functions skipped)
Every generated .py file runs successfully with `python <file>` (exit code 0)
Functions that depend on other same-file functions (e.g., _build_extract_schema depends on _schema_props_to_fc) have those dependencies copied inline
Sample inputs use realistic domain data (gene schemas, paper metadata), not placeholder values like 'foo' or 'test'
Each file has a docstring at the top explaining what the function does
